重大頭條（股市相關） ·

橋水第一季13F：台積電成最大新建倉，加碼亞馬遜與AI晶片並撤出軟體股Bridgewater Q1 13F Tilts Toward TSMC, Amazon and Chip Stocks While Cutting Software

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6460948

  • 橋水2026年第一季13F顯示調整科技股配置，由企業軟體轉向AI、半導體與工業類股並降低金融曝險。
  • 台積電為當季最大新建倉標的，披露部位市值約3.64億美元。
  • 亞馬遜為增持幅度最大個股，持股大增後躍居第三大重倉，比重約4.1%。
  • 同步加碼輝達、美光、博通與邁威爾等AI／半導體相關個股。
  • Salesforce遭最大規模清倉且部位縮水幅度最大；Workday、ServiceNow與GoDaddy亦大幅減碼或出清，相關軟體股第一季普遍重挫逾三成。

橋水第一季持股方向由軟體雲端轉向AI與晶片供應鏈，台積電與亞馬遜權重上升並同步加碼多家半導體股；同時清倉或減碼多檔企業軟體，呼應估值修正下的機構再平衡。

  • Bridgewater's Q1 2026 13F shifts tech exposure from enterprise software toward AI, semiconductors and industrials while trimming financials.
  • TSMC was the largest new position at about $364 million in disclosed market value.
  • Amazon saw the biggest add and became the fund's third-largest holding at roughly 4.1%.
  • It also increased Nvidia, Micron, Broadcom and Marvell as part of its AI-semiconductor tilt.
  • Salesforce was the largest liquidation with a major stake reduction; Workday, ServiceNow and GoDaddy were cut too as software fell over 30% in Q1.

Bridgewater's Q1 filing boosts TSMC, Amazon and chip names while exiting Salesforce-like software, signaling a sector rotation amid valuation pressur…
